summary: Completed backend API testing (15/15 tests passed) but frontend has critical compilation error preventing UI testing

critical_bugs.issue: Maximum call stack size exceeded - infinite recursion in babel plugin
critical_bugs.impact: Frontend completely fails to compile and load
critical_bugs.error_details: RangeError in /app/frontend/plugins/visual-edits/babel-metadata-plugin.js at analyzeMemberExpression and getArrayIterationContext functions

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test any UI features due to compilation failure

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend compilation error in babel-metadata-plugin.js causing infinite recursion. The babel plugin at /app/frontend/plugins/visual-edits/babel-metadata-plugin.js has a maximum call stack size exceeded error preventing the React app from compiling. This blocks all frontend testing and user access.
